title_cn: 国泰航空上半年盈利强劲，股价上涨
summary: Cathay Pacific Airways Ltd. shares jumped as much as 3% after the carrier signaled a rise in first-half net income, driven by strong passenger and cargo demand despite the Iran war-induced oil-price shock.

title: Spanish Banks Tackle US Payment Dominance With Tap-to-Pay System
title_cn: 西班牙银行通过触碰支付系统应对美国支付主导地位
summary: Spanish banks are taking a new step to chip away at the dominance of US payment systems such as Visa Inc. and Mastercard Inc. by offering a new bank-to-bank payment system in stores.

title_cn: 印度尼西亚 TBS Energi 为该单位寻求 1 亿美元私人贷款
summary: Indonesian energy firm TBS Energi Utama is seeking $100 million in private credit for its Singapore-based waste management unit Cora Environment to fund capital expenditure, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Gold Extends Gains as Dip-Buyers Shrug Off US-Iran Escalation
title_cn: 黄金延续涨势，因逢低买家摆脱美伊局势升级的影响
summary: Gold extended gains as dip-buyers supported prices despite escalating tensions in the Middle East keeping the market under pressure.

title: Rubio, Jaishankar Urge Trade Deal Despite Pharma Tariff Threat
title_cn: 尽管面临药品关税威胁，卢比奥和苏杰生仍敦促达成贸易协议
summary: US Secretary of State Marco Rubio and his Indian counterpart S. Jaishankar reinforced the importance of concluding an interim trade agreement between their two countries during a meeting in Manila on Wednesday.

title: Thai Bonds Are Beating Asia and Analysts Predict More Gains
title_cn: 泰国债券跑赢亚洲，分析师预测将进一步上涨
summary: Thailand’s bonds have beaten their emerging Asian peers over the past month and analysts predict they will extend gains on favorable supply dynamics and slower inflation.

title: Nasdaq Futures Slip Before Tech Earnings, Brent Up: Markets Wrap
title_cn: 纳斯达克期货先于科技股盈利下滑，布伦特原油上涨：市场总结
summary: US equity-index futures slipped and Asian stocks pared gains as investors turned cautious ahead of Alphabet Inc.’s earnings after recent volatility pushed a key semiconductor gauge into a bear market. Oil climbed as hopes for US-Iran peace talks faded.

title: FTSE 100 Live: UK Inflation Slows More Than Expected in June
title_cn: 富时 100 实时指数：英国 6 月份通胀放缓幅度超出预期

title: Rare Earths Giant Lynas Shares Fall to Five-Month Low After Revenue Miss
title_cn: 稀土巨头莱纳斯营收未达预期，股价跌至五个月低点
summary: Lynas Rare Earths Ltd. shares dropped to a five-month low after Australia’s largest rare-earths producer reported quarterly sales that missed analysts’ expectations.

title: South Africa Finance Chief Set to Remove PIC Chairman, N24 Says
title_cn: N24 称南非财政部长将罢免 PIC 主席
summary: South Africa’s finance chief is preparing to oust his deputy from the position of chairman of the board of the Public Investment Corp., the state pension fund manager that’s been wracked by corruption and instability, News24 reported.

title: Indian Refiners Halt Iraq Oil Loadings on Rising Hormuz Risk
title_cn: 印度炼油商因霍尔木兹风险上升而暂停伊拉克石油装载
summary: Two Indian state-run refiners have suspended crude oil loadings from Iraq as mounting security risks in the Strait of Hormuz make it increasingly difficult to ensure safety of vessels, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Copper Wavers Near $14,000 as Traders Watch for Trump’s Tariff
title_cn: 交易员关注特朗普关税，铜价波动至 14,000 美元附近
summary: Copper pulled back from its highest level since early June as traders watched for any announcement from the White House on its plans for import tariffs on the metal.

title: Japan 40-Year Bond Sale Sees Strongest Demand Since March 2025
title_cn: 日本 40 年期债券发行需求创 2025 年 3 月以来最强劲
summary: Japan’s 40-year government bond auction drew its strongest demand since March 2025 as investors were attracted to higher yields.

title: Wheat Gains On Black Sea Risks and Corn Hits Two-Month High
title_cn: 黑海风险令小麦上涨，玉米创两个月新高
summary: Wheat rose for a second session on escalating Black Sea tensions and worsening crop prospects.

title: Latest Oil Market News and Analysis for July 22
title_cn: 7 月 22 日最新石油市场新闻和分析
summary: Oil extended gains after President Donald Trump played down the prospect of near-term talks with Iran while threatening broader strikes, as risks to global supply spread beyond the Middle East to the Black Sea.

title: Rising Crude, US Rate-Hike Bets Counter Dollar Inflow Support for Rupee
title_cn: 原油上涨、美国加息押注美元流入对卢比的支撑
summary: The Indian currency has fallen about 2% from its June high.

title: Korean Stocks Jump as Brokers Say Margin Unwind Nearing End
title_cn: 经纪商表示保证金平仓接近尾声，韩国股市上涨
summary: South Korean stocks jumped, as the unwinding of leveraged bets that helped drive the benchmark nearly 30% below its peak appeared to be nearing its end.

title: PHP/USD: Philippine Peso Declines to Match Record Low on Higher Oil Prices
title_cn: PHP/美元：油价上涨导致菲律宾比索跌至历史新低
summary: The Philippine peso dropped to match the record low as higher oil prices put pressure on the currency.

title: Innolight Seeks Up to $7 Billion in Biggest Hong Kong Listing in Years
title_cn: 旭创科技寻求筹集高达 70 亿美元的资金，进行多年来最大规模的香港上市
summary: China’s Zhongji Innolight Co. has started taking investor orders for a Hong Kong listing to raise as much as HK$55 billion ($7 billion), the city’s biggest in seven years.

title: High-Risk Bets That Burned Korean Traders Are Making a Comeback
title_cn: 令韩国交易员焦头烂额的高风险押注正在卷土重来
summary: South Korea’s risk-loving retail investors are flocking to a leveraged instrument that has inflicted severe losses in the past, adding to concerns about abrupt unwinding of wagers as the stock market gyrates.

title: XPeng Hunts New Markets to Escape Reliance on Weaker China
title_cn: 小鹏汽车寻找新市场以摆脱对中国疲软的依赖
summary: XPeng Inc. is rolling out more models overseas and scouting for new markets from South America to Asia as demand in China’s domestic electric vehicle market continues to slow.

title: Yen Slides Past 163 Mark to Fresh Four-Decade Low Against Dollar
title_cn: 日元兑美元汇率跌破163关口，创四年新低
summary: The yen slid past 163 per dollar for the first time since 1986, extending its decline and further testing Japanese authorities’ resolve to intervene.

title: Indian Rupee Rebound Bets Vanish as Soaring Crude Blunts Inflows
title_cn: 由于原油价格飙升抑制资金流入，印度卢比反弹押注消失
summary: With oil prices on the ascent again, bets that tens of billions of dollars in fresh capital inflows would sustain a recovery in the Indian rupee have all but vanished.

title: Blackstone Tying Up $3 Billion AirTrunk Loan as Data Center Debt Binge Woes Grow
title_cn: 随着数据中心债务狂潮的加剧，黑石集团将提供 30 亿美元的 AirTrunk 贷款
summary: Blackstone Inc. is finalizing a group of banks to underwrite a A$4.3 billion ($3 billion) loan for the construction of AirTrunk Pty.’s new data center in Australia, according to people familiar with the matter, despite growing worries over the massive debt racked up for artificial intelligence infrastructure projects.

title: Gas-Rich Australian Region Backs $28 Billion Data Center Project
title_cn: 富含天然气的澳大利亚地区支持价值 280 亿美元的数据中心项目
summary: Australia’s Northern Territory has granted land to a major data center project that claims it could attract A$40 billion ($28 billion) in private investment.

title: Sony and Mitsubishi Set Up AI Vision Joint Venture for Factories
title_cn: 索尼与三菱成立工厂人工智能视觉合资公司
summary: Mitsubishi Electric Corp. and Sony Group Corp. said they will set up a joint venture to provide factory automation services by combining their expertise in artificial intelligence and image sensors.

title: China’s ‘AI for All’ Offensive Defies US Containment Playbook
title_cn: 中国的“全民人工智能”攻势无视美国的遏制策略
summary: The rapidly increasing global competitiveness of China’s artificial intelligence models is ringing alarm bells in Washington, posing a new test for the standard protectionist playbook.

title: OpenAI Says Its Models Accidentally Hacked Hugging Face
title_cn: OpenAI 称其模型因拥抱脸部而被意外黑客攻击
summary: OpenAI said its advanced artificial intelligence models inadvertently hacked Hugging Face Inc. in an “unprecedented” incident that prompted fresh calls for curbs on the technology.

title: TSMC to Hike Chip Prices by Up to 10% in 2027, Nikkei Says
title_cn: 日经新闻称台积电将于 2027 年将芯片价格提高最多 10%
summary: Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Co. has held discussions with clients about chipmaking price increases of as much as 10% in 2027 to cover the rising cost of manufacturing, the Nikkei reported, citing people with knowledge of the matter.

title: Newborn Town Targets Global Viewers With AI-Made Short Dramas
title_cn: 《新生小镇》以人工智能短剧吸引全球观众
summary: Chinese social networking and entertainment provider Newborn Town Inc. is doubling down on artificial intelligence to create short dramas in a bet the technology can slash costs while fueling growth across emerging markets.

title: Robinhood Prediction Market Revenue to Top Crypto: Analysts
title_cn: Robinhood 预测加密货币市场收入最高：分析师
summary: Trading platform Robinhood Markets Inc.’s revenue from prediction market is set to overshadow that from cryptocurrency trading, starting as soon as the second quarter, analysts at Bernstein and Piper Sandler said this week.

title: Nintendo Scores Hit With Tomodachi Life as Gamers Seek Escape With Life Sims
title_cn: 任天堂《Tomodachi Life》大获成功，玩家纷纷通过《Life Sims》寻求逃离
summary: Six years after Nintendo Co.’s Animal Crossing: New Horizons became a lockdown phenomenon, the company is scoring another major hit worldwide from gamers seeking an escape from rising anxiety and isolation.

title: Super Micro Jumps After Early Results Show Rising Backlog
title_cn: 早期结果显示积压不断增加，超微跳跃
summary: Super Micro Computer Inc. shares rose about 15% in extended trading after the server maker issued preliminary results saying its backlog hit a record on new orders in the quarter of more than $60 billion.

title: Intel Rallies on Plans for Headcount Reductions
title_cn: 英特尔因裁员计划而集会
summary: Intel Corp. shares rallied Tuesday after the company confirmed it will cut more jobs to reduce costs and shake up its key data center unit.

title: OpenAI Names BNY, Nubank CEOs to Board Ahead of IPO
title_cn: OpenAI 任命 BNY 和 Nubank 首席执行官在 IPO 前加入董事会
summary: OpenAI has appointed two financial services executives to its board of directors, drawing on their experience as the company moves toward a Wall Street debut.

title: Amazon’s Portal for Business Nears $60 Billion in Revenue
title_cn: 亚马逊商业门户收入接近 600 亿美元
summary: Amazon.com Inc.’s business sales unit was recently on track to sell $60 billion of merchandise over the course of a full year, up about 71% from 2023, evidence that the world’s largest online retailer is gaining ground in corporate sales.

title: Tesla’s Problem Is Opposite of Big Tech: Not Enough AI Spending
title_cn: 特斯拉的问题与大型科技公司相反：人工智能支出不足
summary: After hearing Tesla Inc.’s seemingly countless promises about artificial intelligence, autonomous driving and robotics, Wall Street wants the company to start putting its money where its mouth is.

title: France Passes Bill to Ban Social Media for Children Under 15
title_cn: 法国通过法案禁止 15 岁以下儿童使用社交媒体
summary: France passed legislation to restrict the use of social media for children under 15 years old, becoming the first major European country to do so in a move that may strain relations with US technology companies and President Donald Trump.

title: Nvidia Touts Progress Getting New Rubin Design to Customers
title_cn: Nvidia 向客户宣传新 Rubin 设计的进展
summary: Nvidia Corp., the semiconductor company at the heart of the artificial intelligence boom, said its latest chip designs are making their way to customers and will help solidify the chipmaker’s leadership in the industry.

title: OpenAI’s Altman to Brief US Officials on Next Wave of AI Models
title_cn: OpenAI 的 Altman 将向美国官员介绍下一波人工智能模型
summary: OpenAI Chief Executive Officer Sam Altman plans to brief the Trump administration and US lawmakers next week on the upcoming generation of artificial intelligence models as the US works to create a process to review the safety of cutting-edge AI systems, according to a senior company executive.

title: Apple to Launch ‘Upgrade’ Device Leasing Program With Klarna to Spur Sales
title_cn: 苹果将​​与 Klarna 合作推出“升级”设备租赁计划以刺激销售
summary: Apple Inc. is preparing to introduce Apple Upgrade, a leasing program that will mark one of the biggest-ever changes to how the company sells devices.

title: China’s Moonshot in Talks on Pre-IPO Funds at $50 Billion Value
title_cn: 中国在价值 500 亿美元的 Pre-IPO 基金谈判中的登月计划
summary: Moonshot AI is preparing to begin discussions in August on a final round of fundraising before listing in Hong Kong, capitalizing on the excitement around its latest model to raise capital at a valuation of as much as $50 billion.

title: Z.AI to Use Only Chinese AI Chips at New Giant Data Center
title_cn: Z.AI将在新巨型数据中心仅使用中国AI芯片
summary: Z.AI has completed construction of a major data center that it plans to fill only with Chinese-made chips, a step forward in Beijing’s efforts to shift away from restricted Nvidia Corp. silicon for future AI development.

title: India’s Cockroach Movement: What Is the CJP, Why Are Students Protesting
title_cn: 印度蟑螂运动：什么是 CJP，学生为何抗议
summary: What started out as a social media joke among Gen Z is turning into a major headache for the political establishment in India, as the “Cockroach Janta Party” draws support from young people frustrated by a lack of jobs and a string of controversies in the education system.

title: Burnham Walks Back Suggestion He’ll Lift UK Income Tax Threshold
title_cn: 伯纳姆收回了他将提高英国所得税起征点的建议
summary: Andy Burnham isn’t considering an increase to the UK’s cap on tax-free earnings, according to people familiar with the matter, as the new prime minister tries to signal fiscal discipline to skeptical bond markets.

title: Saudi Arabia, UAE Officials Signal Unity After Months of Tensions
title_cn: 沙特阿拉伯和阿联酋官员在数月紧张局势后表示团结
summary: Senior Saudi and United Arab Emirates officials posted coordinated social media messages highlighting the two countries’ longstanding ties, a display of public alignment after months of tensions between the Gulf neighbors and a renewed escalation in the Iran war.

title: Trump’s 100% Generic Drug Duty Threatens US Low-Cost Supply
title_cn: 特朗普100%仿制药关税威胁美国低成本供应
summary: Generic drug manufacturers will have two years to move production to the US or face a 100% import duty from August 2028, President Donald Trump said, threatening the supply of low-cost medicines that millions of Americans rely on.

title: Trump Ally Biggs Secures Win in Arizona Governor’s Race
title_cn: 特朗普盟友比格斯在亚利桑那州州长竞选中获胜
summary: Representative Andy Biggs, a conservative hard-liner backed by President Donald Trump, won the Republican primary for governor in Arizona, setting up a showdown with Democratic incumbent Governor Katie Hobbs in the November midterm elections.

title: Modi Has Few Good Options to Quell India’s ‘Cockroach’ Protests
title_cn: 莫迪没有什么好的选择来平息印度的“蟑螂”抗议
summary: What started as a satirical online movement two months ago has turned into one of India’s biggest student protests in years, sparking scenes of violent clashes in New Delhi. And Prime Minister Narendra Modi has few good options to stop them.

title: Kremlin Hardens Demands on Occupied Land in Ukraine, Blaming US
title_cn: 克里姆林宫加强对乌克兰被占土地的要求，指责美国
summary: Russia is no longer willing to return some occupied territories to Ukraine as part of any deal to end the war and plans to retain them as buffer zones, according to people close to the Kremlin.

title: Mamdani Concedes He Can’t Arrest Netanyahu in New York City
title_cn: 马姆达尼承认他无法在纽约逮捕内塔尼亚胡
summary: New York Mayor Zohran Mamdani said his city doesn’t have the ability to arrest Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu.

title: House Passes Stopgap to Avert Shutdown Before Midterm Election
title_cn: 众议院通过权宜之计以避免中期选举前关闭
summary: The House passed stopgap funding to keep the government open past the midterm elections, though the measure now faces demands for changes in the Senate.

title: India Minister Breaks Silence as Student Protest Turns Violent
title_cn: 印度部长在学生抗议演变成暴力事件时打破沉默
summary: India’s Education Minister Dharmendra Pradhan remained defiant in his first public remarks after student protests calling for his resignation turned violent, saying the government remained committed to addressing concerns over exam paper leaks.

title: Trump’s Election Demands Get Test in Arizona Primary Races
title_cn: 特朗普的选举要求在亚利桑那州初选中得到考验
summary: President Donald Trump wants GOP lawmakers to back his plan to scrutinize the November midterm elections, echoing unfounded complaints he still makes about his 2020 defeat. Arizona’s primaries on Tuesday are the first test of whether that message is energizing Republican voters.

title: China Envoy Faces Neighbors Spooked by ‘Destabilizing’ Moves
title_cn: 中国特使面对因“破坏稳定”举动而感到恐慌的邻国
summary: China’s top diplomat arrived in the Philippines this week carrying a message of regional stability — to an audience of Asian neighbors that Beijing itself has unnerved recently.

title: Trump Plays Down Prospects of Iran Talks Amid Red Sea Threat
title_cn: 特朗普在红海威胁中淡化伊朗谈判的前景
summary: President Donald Trump minimized the prospect of immediate talks with Iran as the two sides exchanged strikes and Houthi militants in Yemen threatened shipping in the Red Sea.

title: Maduro Trial Could Come in June 2027 Under Proposed Schedule
title_cn: 马杜罗审判可能按照拟议时间表于 2027 年 6 月进行
summary: Ousted Venezuelan leader Nicolás Maduro could go to trial on US drug-trafficking and narco-terrorism conspiracy charges in June 2027, under a schedule that both sides are proposing to the federal judge who will preside over the case.

title: Terrorism Victims Urge US Not to Release Iranian Funds
title_cn: 恐怖主义受害者敦促美国不要释放伊朗资金
summary: Groups representing victims of Iranian-linked terrorism urged the US not to release any money to Tehran, underscoring the political risks for President Donald Trump of fulfilling a key demand under a possible peace deal.

title: EUR/CNY: Why China’s Yuan Is Drawing Scrutiny in Europe, What It Means for Euro
title_cn: 欧元/人民币：为何人民币在欧洲受到关注，这对欧元意味着什么
summary: The value of the yuan has become a flashpoint in trade relations between China and the European Union. Many EU policymakers and economists believe the currency is undervalued and a key driver of the bloc’s deepening trade deficit with the East Asian nation. That imbalance averaged about $1.1 billion a day in June.

title: Mystery of Returned Arizona Ballots Sparks Federal, State Probes
title_cn: 亚利桑那州选票退回之谜引发联邦、州调查
summary: Federal and state officials are investigating reports that nearly 1,000 ballots failed to reach voters in a northern Arizona county with a large indigenous population.

title: Modi’s Protectionism Push Creates Stock Winners in Laggard India
title_cn: 莫迪的保护主义推动为落后的印度创造了股市赢家
summary: India’s renewed push to replace critical imports with locally manufactured products is creating a new cohort of stock market winners.

title: Trump Nominates Telecom Lawyer to Lead DOJ’s Antitrust Unit
title_cn: 特朗普提名电信律师领导司法部反垄断部门
summary: President Donald Trump nominated Adam Candeub, the general counsel at the Federal Communications Commission, as an assistant attorney general at the US Justice Department, according to an announcement from the White House.

title: Canada-US Bridge Opening Ceremony Called Off After Trump Tariff
title_cn: 特朗普关税后加美大桥开通仪式被取消
summary: Canada said it would no longer hold a celebratory event with the US for the opening of the new bridge connecting Detroit to Windsor, Ontario, after President Donald Trump promised new 50% tariffs against Canadian goods.
